package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_compare_not_equal_zero: `strings.Compare(...) != 0` instead of direct string inequality.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario651Positive(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Compare(left, right) == 0
}
